name: judge-me-reviews
description: Reads and writes Judge.me reviews, widgets, reviewers, webhooks, shop metadata, settings, replies, and legacy product/widget resources through the Judge.me REST API.

risk.read: external Judge.me API read of Shopify shop reviews, widgets, reviewers, webhooks, shop metadata, settings, and legacy product/widget resources
risk.write: external Judge.me API mutations can create reviews, update moderation/reviewer/shop/webhook state, create replies/comments, and uninstall a shop
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval, execute
